name: Embedding Model Comparison for RO Metrics
purpose: Select optimal sentence embedding model for RO-3 (OOD) and RO-4 (semantic invariance)

evaluation_sets.invariance_eval: 200 manually rated paraphrase pairs (Spearman correlation with human ratings)

selection_rationale: all-mpnet-base-v2 selected for highest OOD AUROC (0.887). Truncated from 768 to 512 dims via PCA (99.1% variance retained).
